summary: AMD hit all-time high $353 on Apr 30. DA Davidson upgraded to Buy with target $375 (from $220). Susquehanna reiterated Buy, raised target to $375. x86 CPU renaissance and AI data center GPU demand are key drivers. Q1 2026 earnings on May 5.
